title: Device Settings  - Custom button - Teams Not Detected
scenario: Verify Teams Custom button UI shows Other Providers options when Microsoft Teams is not connected, and all custom actions can be selected.
steps: Verify the new UI layout shows Microsoft Teams (selected by default) and Other Providers options.
Select Other Providers to see additional options: Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing.
Verify all options under Other Providers can be selected.
Select Microsoft Teams when Teams is not detected/connected.
Observe the modal that appears prompting the user to select 'Other Providers' to assign custom actions.
expected: When Microsoft Teams is not detected/connected and the user selects Microsoft Teams, a modal appears prompting the user to select "Other Providers" to assign custom actions. The UI layout shows Microsoft Teams selected by default alongside Other Providers, and all Other Providers options (Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing) are selectable.
